description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At approximately 12:56pm, a WeRide vehicle (car 1) was slowing to a stop (< 3mph) on 2nd street at the intersection of East San Fernando 
st. to turn left in an effort to yield to crossing pedestrians. At this time a Toyota Prius (car 2) traveling (>10mph) had slammed into car 1's 
rear - causing damage primarily to car 1. Both parties pulled over to a safe location to exchange information but the driver of car 2 could not 
provide a valid insurance or registration certificate.
Print
Clear Form
